scheme_name: JM Multi Strategy Fund - Direct Growth

facts.scheme_name: JM Flexicap Fund Direct Plan Growth
facts.exit_load: Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days.

prose: The scheme which aims to provide capital appreciation by investing primarily in equity and equity related securities of various market depending upon valuation discount or premium amongst Large / Mid & Small cap stocks, the fund will keep varying the weights to capture the value while keeping an optimum Risk / Return profile.
